description: Industrial robot arm visual redesign - metallic color scheme, tapered segments, bolts/rivets, panel lines, and mechanical joints

userStories.title: Update color palette to metallic theme
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to replace the current color constants with the new metallic palette so all subsequent visual changes use the correct colors.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Dark Steel color constant (approximately RGB 70, 75, 85) for the base
Add Silver color constant (approximately RGB 180, 185, 195) for arm 1
Add Cyan/Blue color constant (approximately RGB 60, 170, 210) for arm 2
Add highlight and shadow variant colors for each primary color (lighter and darker versions)
Add a metallic dark color for joint outer rings (approximately RGB 40, 42, 48)
Remove or replace unused old color constants (RED, LIGHT_GRAY, GOLD)
Existing drawing functions reference the new colors (base uses Dark Steel, arm1 uses Silver, arm2 uses Cyan)
Robot arm still renders and all controls work as before
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Redesign base with industrial pedestal and tread details
userStories.description: As a user, I want the base to look like a heavy industrial pedestal with treads so the robot feels grounded and mechanical.
acceptanceCriteria: Base is wider and taller than current rectangle, with a trapezoidal or stepped shape
Base uses Dark Steel color
Base has visible tread or platform detail (horizontal grooves or bolt circles on the sides)
A subtle darker shadow/outline gives the base a 3D feel
Base still moves left/right with arrow keys and stays clamped to screen edges
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Redesign arm segment 1 with tapered shape and industrial details
userStories.description: As a user, I want the first arm segment to look like a mechanical actuator with a tapered shape, panel lines, and rivets.
acceptanceCriteria: Arm 1 uses Silver color
Arm 1 shape is tapered (wider at base pivot, narrower at tip)
A center panel line runs along the length of the segment, rotating with it
At least 2 small rivet/bolt circles drawn on the segment face, rotating with it
A darker edge/outline gives the segment depth
Rotation with Q/W keys works identically to current behavior
Arm 1 return value (end point) is still correct for chaining arm 2
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Redesign arm segment 2 with tapered shape and industrial details
userStories.description: As a user, I want the second arm segment to match the industrial style with a distinct cyan/blue metallic color.
acceptanceCriteria: Arm 2 uses Cyan/Blue color
Arm 2 shape is tapered (wider at joint, narrower at tip)
A center panel line runs along the length of the segment, rotating with it
At least 2 small rivet/bolt circles drawn on the segment face, rotating with it
A darker edge/outline gives the segment depth
Rotation with A/S keys works identically to current behavior
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Redesign joint connections as layered mechanical pivots
userStories.description: As a user, I want the joints between segments to look like heavy mechanical pivot points with layered rings.
acceptanceCriteria: Each joint is drawn as a layered circle: outer dark ring, mid metallic fill, inner bolt/axle circle
Joint at base-arm1 connection uses a steel/dark color scheme
Joint at arm1-arm2 connection uses a matching metallic scheme
Joints are slightly larger than current (increase JOINT_RADIUS)
Joints render on top of arm segments (correct draw order)
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add shadow and highlight edges to all segments
userStories.description: As a user, I want each arm segment and the base to have subtle shadow and highlight effects so the robot looks less flat.
acceptanceCriteria: Each segment (base, arm 1, arm 2) has a slightly darker bottom/right edge drawn as a secondary polygon offset by 2-3 pixels
Highlights (lighter stripe) appear on the top/left edge of each segment
Shadows rotate correctly with the arm segments
No performance degradation (still runs at 60 FPS)
Typecheck passes
